classes.reasoning: The document is titled 'Studiemateriale – Kartleggingsverktøy' (Study Material – Assessment Tools) and contains multiple patient-facing questionnaires and cognitive assessments including MMSE-NR3, MoCA, C-SSRS, and FLAME Battery, administered at various study visits to collect cognitive and psychological data.

summary: This document is a compilation of patient assessment tools and questionnaires for the PATH-1 clinical trial studying dementia. It includes multiple cognitive assessment instruments (Clinical Dementia Rating, MMSE-NR3, MoCA, C-SSRS suicide screening, FLAME Battery) to be administered at screening, baseline, and follow-up visits (weeks 4, 8, and end of study) to evaluate participants' cognitive function, mental status, and safety.
references_to: NORADD-TP (The Norwegian Anti-Dementia Drug Trial Platform)
